ddt:Target.Name: USM 84 Phase 2 C5_4
ddt:Target.Description:
USM C Platform
B. BUSCH, 0134950766 bruno.busch@renault.com

Data.Name: FirstDTC
Data.Description: IGN relay means a problem on Bus Bar connection, low battery voltage, relay problem or reread problem.

List.Item:
Communication Default Type :

1-Open Circuit (type : $01h : "Open Circuit")

2-Short Circuit (type : $0Ch : "Line short circuited")

3-Noise (ACK) (type : $10h : « Disturbed communication »)

Item.Text: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate

Data.Name: Standard Fault
Data.Description:
Coding

  • b7: 0: standard value / 1: system value
  • b6: 0: not memorized failure / 1: memorized failure
  • b5: 0: failure not present / 1: failure present

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
SOC function is inhibited after C_B_KmIllimited
SOC function is not inhibited after C_B_KmIllimited

Data.Name: C_B_FogLamps
Data.Comment: O_LIGHT-FR-FOG-LAMPS LH and RH (AN-02 and AN-03)

Data.Name: C_B_HeadLampsWasher
Data.Comment: O_WASHER left and right (CN-07 and CN-11)

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Device.Name: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate
